sections.title: Purpose and Scope
sections.content: This procedure defines the steps for documenting, investigating, and escalating batch deviations at the Chicago Pharma Pilot Plant. All deviations must be reviewed by QA before batch disposition.

sections.title: Deviation Classification
sections.content: Classify deviations as minor, major, or critical based on impact to product quality, patient safety, and data integrity. Temperature excursions during fermentation are typically classified as major pending impact assessment.

sections.title: Immediate Actions
sections.content: Upon detection of an out-of-spec condition: (1) document the event timestamp, (2) notify shift supervisor, (3) preserve historian data, (4) do not make batch release decisions without QA review.

sections.title: Investigation Requirements
sections.content: Investigations must include: affected equipment list, time-series evidence, operator intervention records, related work orders, and calibration status of involved instruments.

sections.title: Escalation Criteria
sections.content: Escalate to QA within 4 hours for major deviations. Do not close deviation until root cause analysis is documented and corrective actions are assigned.

sections.title: Batch Disposition
sections.content: Only QA may disposition a batch. Manufacturing supervisors may recommend hold or continue processing but cannot authorize release.

sections.title: Purpose
sections.content: Defines clean-in-place procedures for bioreactor trains including conductivity rinse verification.

sections.title: Conductivity Acceptance
sections.content: Final rinse conductivity must be below 0.10 mS/cm before batch release from CIP. Extended holds are permitted but must be documented with start/end timestamps.

sections.title: Hold Conditions
sections.content: If conductivity threshold is not met within expected window, hold the CIP cycle and notify utilities. Do not proceed to batch start until acceptance criteria are met.

sections.title: Sensor Verification
sections.content: CIP conductivity sensor response time should be verified per PM schedule WO-752. Stale sensor data may cause extended rinse cycles.

sections.title: Operating Ranges
sections.content: Fermentation temperature target 37.0°C (acceptable 36.5–37.5°C). pH target 7.10 (acceptable 6.95–7.25). Agitation target 180 rpm (acceptable 170–190 rpm).

sections.title: pH Control
sections.content: If pH trends below lower limit, operator may add buffer per approved addition chart. Document volume, lot number, and timestamp in batch record.

sections.title: Temperature Excursions
sections.content: Temperature above 37.5°C for more than 15 minutes requires deviation initiation and QA notification.

sections.title: Agitator Monitoring
sections.content: Agitator speed below 170 rpm during fermentation must be investigated. Check mechanical coupling and drive motor current.

sections.title: Batch Header
sections.content: Batch B-104, Product MAB-001, Bioreactor BIO-101. Planned start 2025-06-15 08:00, actual start 08:22 (delayed).

sections.title: CIP Record
sections.content: Pre-batch CIP started 07:00. Extended hold 07:30–08:05 due to conductivity. CIP complete 08:05.

sections.title: Fermentation Log
sections.content: Fermentation initiated 08:22. pH low alarm 10:05. Manual buffer addition 10:18. Temperature excursion 10:12–10:30.

sections.title: Deviation Reference
sections.content: Deviation DEV-104 opened 11:15 for temperature excursion and delayed pH correction. QA review pending.

sections.title: Open Items
sections.content: Calibration verification for PH-101 pending. Valve inspection VLV-203 noted by operator. QA disposition not complete.

sections.title: Shift Summary
sections.content: Outgoing shift reports Batch B-104 in fermentation with open deviation DEV-104. Batch started 22 minutes late after CIP hold.

sections.title: Watchouts
sections.content: Monitor pH trend — probe calibration due per WO-731. Transfer valve VLV-203 showed slight sticking during manual check. Temperature returned to range at 10:30.

sections.title: Open Actions
sections.content: QA review pending for DEV-104. Maintenance to inspect VLV-203 per WO-744. Verify PH-101 calibration status before next shift.

sections.title: Data Gaps
sections.content: Manual buffer addition volume confirmed but valve position before/after not fully documented. Recommend completing in batch record.
